files.notes: This file contains 4 distinct lesson sections for April Guide Lessons, each with clear Roman numeral headings and different subject areas: Theology, Word and Business, Literature, and Social Service. The content after the lessons appears to be unrelated material (poems, advertisements) that was incorrectly merged with the Guide Lessons file.
